title: DeliveryPlan
description: PushPilot's gate 6 delivery decision plus deterministic delivery metadata. Consumed by delivery adapters. The agent decides the verb and reason; deterministic code enforces policy invariants (quiet hours, rate limits, dedupe) and may override the agent decision toward a more conservative outcome, logging the override as a separate audit record.

delivery_id.description: UUID v4 identifier for this delivery plan instance.

personalized_brief_id.description: Traces back to the PersonalizedBrief that this plan delivers.

change_id.description: Traces back to the originating ChangeArtifact.

bu_id.description: BU registry ID for the target BU.

recipient_id.description: Opaque identifier for the BU head or delegate. Used for dedupe-key generation and recipient preference lookup. Must not be an email address or phone number — channel adapters resolve contact details separately.

recipient_display.description: Display-name attribution for the recipient. Contains no contact details (no email, phone, or employee ID).

role.description: Recipient's organizational role (e.g., 'BU Head', 'VP Commercial Operations').

produced_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when PushPilot produced this plan.

version.description: PushPilot agent version at time of production.

decision.description: Gate 6 delivery decision. 'send_now': deliver immediately. 'hold_until': defer to scheduled_time. 'digest': bundle into the next digest run. 'escalate': route to HITL queue.

channel.description: Target delivery channel. Null when decision is 'escalate' (channel unresolved) or 'hold_until' pending further decision.

scheduled_time.description: ISO-8601 UTC time to deliver. Null when decision is 'send_now' (deliver immediately) or 'escalate'.

reason.description: Required plain-English explanation of the gate 6 decision. Must name specific signals (e.g., 'Recipient in quiet hours until 08:00; holding until window opens'). Must not contain PII or internal secrets.

dedupe_key.description: Deterministic deduplication key. Generated as: SHA-256 of (change_id + bu_id + recipient_id + message_variant_id), where message_variant_id is a stable SHA-256 of the chosen message variant content. Keys are stable across replays of the same logical notification. Used to prevent duplicate deliveries.

policy_check.description: Result of the pre-delivery policy check executed by deterministic code (not the agent).

passed.description: True if all policy checks passed. False if any violation was detected.

violations.description: Specific policy violations detected. Empty or absent when passed is true.

reasons.description: Human-readable explanations for each violation. Must not contain PII.

max_attempts.description: Maximum delivery attempts including the first.

retry_on.description: Error conditions that trigger a retry.

confidence_score.description: PushPilot's confidence in the gate 6 decision. 0 = no confidence; 1 = fully certain.

decisions.description: Gate 6 decision made by PushPilot. Typically one entry per delivery plan.
